parameters.content:
## WF-01: Intelligence & Research

**Schedule:** Monday 7:30 AM SAST
**Purpose:** Scrapes competitor blogs, parses RSS feeds, runs AI trend analysis.
**AI Model:** Claude Sonnet via OpenRouter
**Output:** Research Insights table + weekly intelligence email

## Data Collection

Competitor scraping (SHA-256 hash for change detection)
+ RSS feed parsing (regex XML, last 7 days only)

2s delay between competitor scrapes
1s delay between RSS feeds

## AI Analysis

Single batched OpenRouter call:
- 1500 max tokens
- Temperature 0.5 (factual)
- Identifies trends, competitor moves, content opportunities
- JSON output with fallback

## Storage & Reporting

Insights stored in Research Insights table
Content hashes updated in System State
Weekly intelligence email to Ian

# WF-01: Intelligence & Research
**Schedule:** Monday 7:30 AM SAST | **Trigger:** Weekly Monday 7:30AM
**Purpose:** Scrapes competitors, reads RSS feeds, runs AI trend analysis, stores insights.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $('WF-02 System Config').item.json.aiModel }}",
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are the Content Strategist for AnyVision Media, a digital media and AI automation agency in South Africa.

## Your Task
Create a 7-day social media content calendar based on the provided research insights and performance data.

## Company Context
- Services: AI workflow automation, web development, social media management, real estate tech
- Owner: Ian Immelman
- Target audience: Small to medium businesses looking to automate and scale
- Brand color: #FF6D5A

## Content Mix Guidelines
- Educational (40%): Tips, how-tos, industry insights
- Engagement (30%): Questions, polls, behind-the-scenes, stories
- Promotional (30%): Case studies, service highlights, testimonials

## Platform Strategy
- TikTok: Quick tips, trending hooks, short-form video scripts (Mon, Wed, Fri, Sun)
- Instagram: Visual content, carousels, stories, reels (Tue, Thu, Sat)
- Facebook: Community engagement, stories, longer-form posts (Mon, Wed, Thu)

## Output Format (JSON array only, no markdown, no backticks):
[
  {
    "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "topic": "Specific, actionable topic title",
    "content_type": "social_post",
    "platforms": ["TikTok", "Instagram", "Facebook"],
    "brief": "2-3 sentence brief explaining the angle, key points to hit, and target audience segment",
    "campaign": "General Brand Awareness"
  }
]

## Rules
- Each day MUST have a unique angle — no repeated topics within the week
- Reference specific trends or competitor gaps from the research when possible
- Not every post goes to all 3 platforms — be strategic about platform selection
- Avoid topics already covered in the performance data (last 7 days)
- If research insights mention high-relevance trends, prioritize those
- Include a mix of evergreen and timely content
- Every brief must be specific enough for an AI writer to produce the content without further context"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.strategyContext) }}
    }
  ]
}

parameters.content:
## WF-02: Strategy & Campaign Planning

**Schedule:** Monday 8:30 AM SAST (after WF-01)
**Purpose:** Reads research insights + performance data, AI generates 7-day content plan.
**AI Model:** Claude Sonnet via OpenRouter
**Output:** Content Calendar entries + weekly strategy email

## Data Gathering

4 parallel Airtable reads:
1. Research Insights (this week)
2. Distribution Log (last 7 days)
3. Content (last 7 days, avoid repeats)
4. Content Calendar (existing plans)

## AI Strategy

2000 max tokens, temp 0.7
Generates 7-day content calendar
Filters dates with existing plans
Writes directly to Content Calendar

# WF-02: Strategy & Campaign Planning
**Schedule:** Monday 8:30 AM SAST | **Trigger:** Weekly Monday 8:30AM
**Purpose:** Reads research insights, generates weekly content calendar via AI strategist.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $('WF-03 System Config').item.json.aiModel }}",
  "max_tokens": 500,
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are the Social Media Content Writer for AnyVision Media, a digital media and AI automation agency based in South Africa.

## Brand Voice
- Professional but approachable
- Tech-savvy, innovation-focused
- Confident without being arrogant
- Use clear, jargon-free language when possible
- Always provide actionable value

## Company Context
- Services: AI workflow automation, web development, social media management, real estate tech solutions
- Owner: Ian Immelman
- Target audience: Small to medium businesses looking to automate and scale
- Brand color: #FF6D5A

## Platform-Specific Rules
- TikTok: Script-style, conversational, hook in first line. 50-100 words. Use 3-5 trending hashtags.
- Instagram: Visual-first caption, 100-200 words. Use 5-10 relevant hashtags at the end.
- Facebook: Storytelling format, 100-200 words. Encourage comments. Use 1-3 hashtags.

## Output Format (JSON only, no markdown, no backticks):
{
  "hook": "The attention-grabbing first line",
  "body": "The main content after the hook",
  "cta": "Call to action sentence",
  "hashtags": "#hashtag1 #hashtag2 #hashtag3"
}

## Rules
- Never use excessive exclamation marks (1 max per post)
- Never use emojis excessively (1-2 max per post)
- Always include a clear call-to-action
- Make the hook specific and curiosity-driven, not generic
- Reference real pain points of the target audience
- The hook should work standalone as the first thing people see"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Write a social media post for the following:

Topic: {{ $json.Topic }}
Platform: {{ $json.Platform }}
Brief: {{ $json.Brief }}

Generate content optimized for the specified platform."
    }
  ]
}

parameters.content:
## WF-03: Content Production

**Schedule:** Daily at 9:00 AM SAST
**Purpose:** Reads content calendar, generates social posts via AI, optimizes hooks, queues for distribution.
**AI Model:** Claude Sonnet via OpenRouter
**Quality Gate:** Score >= 6 auto-queues; < 6 held as Draft

## AI Content Generation

Two-pass AI pipeline:
1. Generate post (hook, body, CTA, hashtags)
2. Optimize hook (3 variations, pick best)

JSON-only output, markdown-strip fallback.

## Quality Gate & Storage

Score >= 6: Auto-queue for publishing
Score < 6: Held as Draft for human review

All content stored in Airtable regardless of score.

## Error Handling

All external API nodes have:
- continueOnFail
- retryOnFail (AI calls)

Uncaught errors -> Gmail alert

# WF-03: Content Production
**Schedule:** Daily 9:00 AM SAST | **Trigger:** Daily 9AM Trigger
**Purpose:** Reads content calendar, generates social posts via AI, quality gates, queues for publishing.

## WF-04: Distribution & Publishing

**Schedule:** Daily at 10:00 AM SAST (cron: 0 8 * * * UTC)
**Purpose:** Reads publish queue, posts to 3 platforms via Blotato, logs results.
**No AI tokens used** — pure distribution.

## Platform Posting (Blotato)

Posts in parallel to:
TikTok, Instagram, Facebook

continueOnFail on each platform node.

## Result Logging

Merge node (append mode, 9 inputs) collects all platform results.
Per-platform results stored in Distribution Log.
Queue and Content status updated to Published.

# WF-04: Distribution & Publishing
**Schedule:** Daily 10:00 AM SAST | **Trigger:** Daily 10AM Trigger
**Purpose:** Reads publish queue, posts to 3 platforms via Blotato, logs results.

# Shared Error Handler
Catches errors from ALL workflow sections above. Email includes the failing node name for quick identification.
